name: urk
description: Universal Runtime Kernel - public, open-source runtime for interactive browser experiences

scripts.build: corepack yarn workspace @urk/core build && corepack yarn workspace @urk/adapters build && corepack yarn workspace @urk/react-urk build && corepack yarn workspace @urk/next-urk build && corepack yarn workspace urk-examples build && corepack yarn workspace @urk/next-proof build
scripts.test: corepack yarn workspace @urk/core test && corepack yarn workspace @urk/adapters test && corepack yarn workspace @urk/react-urk test && corepack yarn workspace @urk/next-urk test && corepack yarn workspace urk-examples test && corepack yarn workspace @urk/next-proof test
scripts.lint: corepack yarn workspace @urk/core lint && corepack yarn workspace @urk/adapters lint && corepack yarn workspace @urk/react-urk lint && corepack yarn workspace @urk/next-urk lint && corepack yarn workspace urk-examples lint && corepack yarn workspace @urk/next-proof lint
